{{Infobox character
| name = Yarech
| appears_in = Cradle
| abilities = Pattern of suspended death, Worldweaving techniques
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Yarech is a former noble who possesses the ability to use a [[Pattern]] to delay his own death. His physical appearance is heavily scarred, characterized by numerous stitches and bandages that give him the appearance of a creature made from various pieces of flesh. Despite sustaining significant injuries, such as being torn apart by [[Tanakite Worldweavers]] and taking numerous arrow wounds, he possesses a unique resilience where his flesh can be punctured without bleeding. In combat, he utilizes a war-hammer to defend himself and others. He is capable of performing large leaps that result in minimal physical impact upon landing, a skill used in conjunction with [[Wuraia]] to assist companions in navigating difficult terrain.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Having been previously torn apart by the [[Tanakite Worldweavers]], Yarech's body is now heavily stitched and held together with tape. He utilizes [[Worldweaving]] techniques to maintain a [[Pattern]] of suspended death, which allows him to postpone injury and destruction indefinitely. Through this specialized [[Pattern]], he is also able to suspend a war-hammer featuring a [[diamond]] head.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yarech]]'s body is heavily stitched and taped together.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yarech]] possesses a [[Pattern]] of suspended death.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yarech]]'s [[Pattern]] allows him to postpone destruction and injury indefinitely.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yarech]] uses [[Worldweaving]] techniques.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yarech]] uses a war-hammer with a [[diamond]] head suspended by his [[Pattern]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yarech]] uses a [[Pattern]] to suspend death.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yarech]] was previously torn apart by the [[Tanakite Worldweavers]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
